subcodes.first_line: O remnant of that resplendent star shining from the luminous horizon! Two of your letters have been received, one in Haifa and one from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن نجم ساطع از افق لامع دو مکتوب شما رسید یکی در حیفا و یکی از
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @personal instructions, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation
